rows.label: qev041001_MSG0001
rows.name:
Nmoo! You're a useless bodyguard-mo! Why
haven't you even prepared a weapon-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041001_MSG0002
rows.name:
It got busted by monsters during the long
trip from NLA, you see. Didn't exactly have
the leeway to protect my buddy, either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041001_MSG0003
rows.name:
It's fine, ain't it? As long as
you get me a weapon, I'll escort
you just like our contract says.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041001_MSG0004
rows.name:
Heheh, Boss Zazazan. Please,
go and fetch one for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041001_MSG0005
rows.name:
Nnunu... why does Zazazan, the
employer, have to be the one
getting asked for favors-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041001_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Are you a BLADE over there too-mo?
This guy is just a little too awful-mo.
Are all of you like this-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041001_JNK0010
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev041001_SEL0011
rows.name: Criticize Harvey's work ethic.

rows.label: qev041001_JNK0020
rows.name: Defend

rows.label: qev041001_SEL0021
rows.name:
Defend Harvey by saying
trouble is part of the job.

rows.label: qev041001_MSG0007
rows.name:
Haha! That's harsh! Can't compete with
a serious goody-two-shoes like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041001_MSG0008
rows.name:
...I should have just asked someone
like you from the very start-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041001_MSG0009
rows.name:
Heheh, how kind of you. I'm so grateful
it's bringing tears to my eyes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041001_MSG0010
rows.name:
...This guy is underestimating
us-mo. I think he's completely
different from a person like you-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041001_MSG0011
rows.name:
You seem a lot more trustworthy than
this guy-mo. I should have asked someone
like you from the very start-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041001_MSG0012
rows.name:
But the contract is still
standing, so I have to have
this guy act as my bodyguard-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041001_MSG0013
rows.name:
Heheh, that's much appreciated. As
long as I have a weapon, I'll put my
life on the line to protect you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041001_MSG0014
rows.name:
Nnunu... since it's come to this, you there, could
you go get a weapon for this guy to use-mo? Then
I can finally have him be my bodyguard-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041001_MSG0015
rows.name:
Please-mo! Zazazan has to hurry and
go deliver merchandise to NLA-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041001_MSG0016
rows.name:
You're an Earthling who understands
reason-mo. Well then, just go fetch
a suitable weapon for him-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041001_MSG0017
rows.name:
The weapon has to be an Iron Sword,
alright? It's my policy. I've decided
I won't fight if it ain't that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041001_MSG0018
rows.name:
And for my pals, a Warrior Assault
and a Titanium Shield. Fetch
those three weapons for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041001_MSG0019
rows.name:
Unu...! What an incredibly
shameless guy-mo! It's irritating,
but... please do it-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041001_MSG0020
rows.name:
Usually a much more decent
bodyguard comes, but... I ended
up drawing a terrible dud-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041001_MSG0021
rows.name:
But since I already signed the contract, it
can't be helped-mo. We'll hand over the
weapons and have him hurry up and work-mo.[ST:wait ]
